name: openmythos
description: Deterministic multi-model orchestration harness where code owns the loop.

scripts.void:setup: npm install --prefix void-terminal/server && npm install --prefix void-terminal/frontend
scripts.void:build: npm run build --prefix void-terminal/server && npm run build --prefix void-terminal/frontend
scripts.void:server: npm run claim:port -- 4174 && npm run dev --prefix void-terminal/server
scripts.void:ui: npm run claim:port -- 4175 && npm --prefix void-terminal/frontend run dev -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 4175
